text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 170 

PHRMCY_IND_CD 

LABEL: Pharmacy Indicator Code 

DESCRIPTION: The code indicating whether the beneficiary received drugs during the stay. It also specifies the type of 
drugs. 

SHORT NAME: PHRMCYCD 

LONG NAME: PHRMCY_IND_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No drugs (revenue code other than those listed below) 
1 = General drugs and/pr IV therapy (revenue code
